# CGPDFObjectGetType(_:)

**Function**

Returns the PDF type identifier of an object.

## Declaration

```swift
func CGPDFObjectGetType(_ object: CGPDFObjectRef) -> CGPDFObjectType
```

## Parameters

- **object**: A PDF object. If the value if not a PDF object, the behavior is unspecified.

## Return Value

Returns the type of the `object` parameter. See [doc://com.apple.coregraphics/documentation/CoreGraphics/CGPDFDocument#Abstract-Types-for-PDF-Document-Content].

## Getting Object Types and Values

- **CGPDFObjectGetValue(_:_:_:)**: Returns whether an object is of a given type and if it is, retrieves its value.
